I'm fascinated by Urolithin A.

Why won't latex gloves protect you from BPA/BPS in thermal receipts (or EKG paper)?

Latex (natural rubber) is permeable to BPA/BPS. These chemicals dissolve into the latex polymer and slowly migrate through to your skin, especially with repeated handling throughout the day. https://t.co/coQwDjG9jr

Unless your job is to handle receipts, avoid touching them.

It's a completely avoidable exposure and a simple way to lower your contact with endocrine-disrupting chemicals.

If it is your job, wear nitrile (not latex) gloves. https://t.co/NRLIZOMwB9
